collections.name: users
collections.description: Public dancer profile plus server-only identity metadata.
collections.permissions: Public projection readable; owner updates allowed profile fields; identity/admin fields server-only.
collections.migration: Additive fields with defaults; backfill server-side in batches.

collections.name: activities
collections.description: Cypher and reserved future activity types.
collections.permissions: Public reads hide private address; organizer writes own activity through cloud functions.
collections.migration: Version documents; use soft-status transitions and additive backfills.

collections.name: registrations
collections.description: One user's application to one activity.
collections.permissions: Applicant reads/cancels own; organizer reviews through validated cloud function.
collections.migration: Preserve unique pair; cancelled users reactivate the same record and append history; normalize legacy statuses before index creation.

collections.name: attendance
collections.permissions: Participant reads own; organizer writes for own activity through cloud function.
collections.migration: Backfill from completed registrations only with auditable source.

collections.name: pointLedger
collections.description: Immutable idempotent community contribution point entries.
collections.permissions: User reads own; only trusted cloud functions append; no client update/delete.
collections.migration: Never rewrite entries; correction uses compensating entry.

collections.name: levelConfigs
collections.description: Point ranges and display metadata for levels.
collections.permissions: Public read; admin server write only.
collections.migration: Version configs and snapshot awarded level on audit events.

collections.name: privilegeConfigs
collections.permissions: Public read; admin server write only.
collections.migration: Add versioned configs; never infer cash entitlement.

collections.name: userPrivileges
collections.description: Granted privilege usage and quota state.
collections.permissions: User reads own; trusted service grants/consumes atomically.
collections.migration: Recalculate future periods; retain consumed history.

collections.name: platformSupportOrders
collections.description: Voluntary platform support orders, independent from points.
collections.permissions: User reads own; only payment cloud functions update status; public never reads amount list.
collections.migration: Provider changes require adapter; reconcile state server-side.

collections.name: supporterWallEntries
collections.description: Opt-in thank-you wall entries with no amount ranking.
collections.permissions: Approved entries public; owner can request removal; server creates from paid order.
collections.migration: Never backfill without explicit wall consent.

collections.name: feedback
collections.permissions: User creates/reads own; admin server reads and updates status.
collections.migration: Redact legacy free-text PII during retention jobs.

collections.name: reports
collections.description: Auditable safety reports for users or activities.
collections.permissions: Reporter creates/reads own; only admin server reviews; target cannot read report body.
collections.migration: Keep audit history; migrate evidence references separately.

collections.name: featureFlags
collections.permissions: Client reads public projection; admin server writes only.
collections.migration: Unknown flags default false; preserve last-known compatible value.
